TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: laluma'an nu Matel i Tuen(Amilika a kamu: House Nymeros Martell of Sunspear , Hulan a kamu:ťôĹśąüŚüéÁöĄť¶¨ś≥įÁąĺŚģ∂śóŹ ) u cacay a laluma'an nu giki, dadiw nu sulda atu lamal(Amilika: A Song of Ice and Fire), u nisangaan nu misulitay ci George Raymond Richard Martin, u kungku nu nilalamelan nu laylay atu malawlaay nadatengan. izaw ku pituay a pu nu ulic nu nida. malagiki nu HBO i 2011 a mihcaan. laylay nu laluma'an nu Matel namakay i lekelikenan a bunga a sililinay a luma' ci Nameylos Matel, i nidebungan nu Antal a tedemaw tu Weystelo a lala' tayda i Tuen cinida, ci Mukan Matel ku mukeliday, muladay tu hitay nida micidakay atu lalangawan ayda a kasahenulay a tademaw tu laluma'an nu Matel Tulang Nameylos Matel Upelin Nameylos Matel Eylalia Sent malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan nasulitan ni Padakaw Lami' 2020. u Wipsay nu misulitay ci Georgr RR Martin manamuhay a Wikipayke dadiw nu sulda atu lamal
S.PHON: r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu mat…ôr~…ĺ i tu…ôn(amir~…ĺika a kamu: ńßous…ô njm…ôros mart…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ of sunsp…ôar , ńßur~…ĺan a kamu:********* ) u ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu giki, dadiw nu sur~…ĺda atu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ(amir~…ĺika: a soŇč of i ¶…ô and fir…ô), u nisaŇčaan nu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i g…ôorg…ô *ajmond *i ¶ńßard martin, u kuŇčku nu nir~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺan nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj atu mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaaj nadat…ôŇčan. izaw ku pituaj a pu nu ur~…ĺi ¶ nu nida. mar~…ĺagiki nu ńßbo i **** a mińß ¶aan. r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu mat…ôr~…ĺ namakaj i r~…ĺ…ôk…ôr~…ĺik…ônan a buŇča a sir~…ĺir~…ĺinaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ¶i nam…ôr~…ĺos mat…ôr~…ĺ, i nid…ôbuŇčan nu antar~…ĺ a t…ôd…ômaw tu w…ôst…ôr~…ĺo a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tajda i tu…ôn ¶inida, ¶i mukan mat…ôr~…ĺ ku muk…ôr~…ĺidaj, mur~…ĺadaj tu ńßitaj nida mi ¶idakaj atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ajda a kasańß…ônur~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu mat…ôr~…ĺ tur~…ĺaŇč nam…ôr~…ĺos mat…ôr~…ĺ up…ôr~…ĺin nam…ôr~…ĺos mat…ôr~…ĺ …ôr~…ĺar~…ĺia s…ônt mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan nasur~…ĺitan ni padakaw r~…ĺami Ē~ ° ****. u wipsaj nu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i g…ôorgr ** martin manamuńßaj a wikipajk…ô dadiw nu sur~…ĺda atu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ
S.FORM: laluma'an nu Matel i Tuen(Amilika a kamu: House Nymeros Martell of Sunspear , Hulan a kamu:ťôĹśąüŚüéÁöĄť¶¨ś≥įÁąĺŚģ∂śóŹ ) u cacay a laluma'an nu giki, dadiw nu sulda atu lamal(Amilika: A Song of Ice and Fire), u nisangaan nu misulitay ci George Raymond Richard Martin, u kungku nu nilalamelan nu laylay atu malawlaay nadatengan. izaw ku pituay a pu nu ulic nu nida. malagiki nu HBO i 2011 a mihcaan. laylay nu laluma'an nu Matel namakay i lekelikenan a bunga a sililinay a luma' ci Nameylos Matel, i nidebungan nu Antal a tedemaw tu Weystelo a lala' tayda i Tuen cinida, ci Mukan Matel ku mukeliday, muladay tu hitay nida micidakay atu lalangawan ayda a kasahenulay a tademaw tu laluma'an nu Matel Tulang Nameylos Matel Upelin Nameylos Matel Eylalia Sent malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan nasulitan ni Padakaw Lami' 2020. u Wipsay nu misulitay ci Georgr RR Martin manamuhay a Wikipayke dadiw nu sulda atu lamal
S.PHON: r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu mat…ôr~…ĺ i tu…ôn(amir~…ĺika a kamu: ńßous…ô njm…ôros mart…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ of sunsp…ôar , ńßur~…ĺan a kamu:********* ) u ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu giki, dadiw nu sur~…ĺda atu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ(amir~…ĺika: a soŇč of i ¶…ô and fir…ô), u nisaŇčaan nu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i g…ôorg…ô *ajmond *i ¶ńßard martin, u kuŇčku nu nir~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺan nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj atu mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaaj nadat…ôŇčan. izaw ku pituaj a pu nu ur~…ĺi ¶ nu nida. mar~…ĺagiki nu ńßbo i **** a mińß ¶aan. r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu mat…ôr~…ĺ namakaj i r~…ĺ…ôk…ôr~…ĺik…ônan a buŇča a sir~…ĺir~…ĺinaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ¶i nam…ôr~…ĺos mat…ôr~…ĺ, i nid…ôbuŇčan nu antar~…ĺ a t…ôd…ômaw tu w…ôst…ôr~…ĺo a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tajda i tu…ôn ¶inida, ¶i mukan mat…ôr~…ĺ ku muk…ôr~…ĺidaj, mur~…ĺadaj tu ńßitaj nida mi ¶idakaj atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ajda a kasańß…ônur~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu mat…ôr~…ĺ tur~…ĺaŇč nam…ôr~…ĺos mat…ôr~…ĺ up…ôr~…ĺin nam…ôr~…ĺos mat…ôr~…ĺ …ôr~…ĺar~…ĺia s…ônt mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan nasur~…ĺitan ni padakaw r~…ĺami Ē~ ° ****. u wipsaj nu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i g…ôorgr ** martin manamuńßaj a wikipajk…ô dadiw nu sur~…ĺda atu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ
